Navigation.jciDesc: As a JCI-accredited premium medical facility in Istanbul, Turkey, we specialize in high-end bariatric, plastic surgery, and elite dental reconstructions. All procedures include VIP transfers, 5-star Bosphorus accommodation, and dedicated concierge support with a no-hidden-fees guarantee.

Safety.subtext: Meva Clinic operates under the strictest international and European safety standards. Impeccable care, experienced surgeons and 21st century technology.
